results.rendered_html:
sitā
1 Candied sugar, sugar; pittena dūne rasane sitāpi tiktāyate haṃsakulā vataṃsa  N. 3. 94 ;  Bv. 4. 13. 
2 Moonlight.
3 A lovely woman.
4 Spirituous liquor.
5 White Dūrvā grass.
6 Arabian jasmine.
Comp.
— khaṃḍaḥ a kind of refined sugar.
— latā white Dūrvā grass.
